title: Nether Reforged
description: Bring new netherrack to old game versions!
body: Welcome to Nether Reforged! The purpose is simple: replace old ugly netherrack in old game versions with the shiny new version. If you've ever wanted to play in old versions without having to look at the old netherrack texture: here's your solution! Simply install and place in your resourcepack folder, then enable it and enjoy.
